зНІа§Ња§∞а§Њ а§Єа§Ва§ґа•Ла§ња§Іа§§ зРИа§Ха§П а§Ча§Па•§ -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART IIвАФSEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th September, 2018 G.S.R. 840(E).вАФIn exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (2) of section 63 read with sub-section (2) of section 9 of the Competition Act, 2002 (12 of 2003), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Competition Commission of India (Term of the Selection Committee and the manner of selection of panel of names) Rules, 2008, namely:вАФ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Competition Commission of India (Term of the Selection Committee and the manner of selection of panel of names) Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Competition Commission of India (Term of the Selection Committee and the manner of selection of panel of names) Rules, 2008, in rule 4, in sub-rule (3), for the words вАЬone hundred and twenty daysвАЭ, the words вАЬone hundred and eighty daysвАЭ shall be substituted. [F. No. 5/22/2007-CS] K. V. R. MURTY, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (i) vide G.S.R. 111(E), dated 27th February, 2008 and subsequently amended vide G.S.R. 156(E), dated 6th March, 2009, G.S.R. 259(E), dated 20th April, 2009 and G.S.R. 729 (E), dated 15th October, 2014.
